title: Why can't you climb Mt. Kailash? #shorts #himalayas
description:
Mount Kailash duniya ke sabse mysterious parvaton me se ek maana jata hai. 21,778 feet uncha hone ke bawajood aaj tak koi isse conquer nahi kar paya, aur 2001 se Chinese government ne yahan climbing par poori tarah ban laga diya. Ye parvat 30 million saal purana mana jata hai aur iska almost perfect pyramid shape logon ko aur bhi hairaan karta hai. Hindu, Buddhist aur Jain parampara me ise brahmand ka kendr maana gaya hai, isliye yahan sirf parikrama allowed hai. Kai log electronic glitches aur ajeeb compass behavior ki baat bhi karte hain. Sawal ye hai — aakhir aisa kya hai Mount Kailash me jo modern duniya bhi iske aage ruk jaati hai?

#MountKailash #Mystery #AncientHistory #HiddenTruth #TravelFacts #IncredibleWorld
